---
title: Ros PS reports summary
subtitle: "`r paste0('Last updated: ', format(Sys.time(), format = '%d %B %Y - %H:%M'))`" #%F %r %Z
author: "Author: [IOTC Secretariat](mailto:IOTC-Secretariat@fao.org)"
output:
  html_document:
    mathjax: null
    css: "../templates/html_template.css"
---


```{r, setup, include=FALSE, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```
# Summary {.tabset}
```{r}
options(DT.options = list(pageLength = PAGE_LENGTH))
check_data_summary <- result
```
```{r summary, child='report-PS-summary.Rmd'}
```

# Details

```{r, results = "asis"}
for (x in files) {
  report_file <- paste0(".",str_sub(dirname(x), str_length(root_directory)+1),"/report.html")
  htmltools::a()
  cat(sprintf(" * [%s](%s){target=\"_blank\"}", get_file_relative_path(x) , report_file), sep="\n")
}
```
